description: The Contemporary fragrance by police for men is a strong fragrance which is designed for the modern and contemporary male. It has notes of bergamot, grapefruit, juniper, lavender, rosemary, peppermint, jasmine, geranium, violet, clary sage, sandalwood, cedar, moss, musk and tonka bean.Quantity: 90 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
